title: Faster Default
description: A lightweight modpack that keeps all vanilla features the way they are while also boosting the performance of the game. Comparisons are in the gallery for you to judge!
body:
Faster Default is a lightweight modpack that keeps all vanilla features the way they are while boosting the game's performance. I based this pack around making the game completely vanilla while introducing QOL features that make the game much easier. Feel free to add any mods you feel improve the playability of the game like “Distant Horizons” or “Nvidium”

 # **Mods Used In Pack**

- Axiom, 
- click-through, 
- cloth-config, 
- collective, 
- Controlling, 
- dynamic-fps, 
- enhancedblockentities, 
- entityculling-fabric, 
- entity_model_features, 
- entity_sound_features, 
- entity_texture_features, 
- fabric-api, 
- fabric-carpet, 
- fadeless-fabric, 
- fastquit, 
- ferritecore, 
- fpsdisplay, 
- fullbrightnesstoggle, 
- ImmediatelyFast-Fabric, 
- indium, 
- InvMove, 
- iris, 
- krypton, 
- language, 
- litematica-fabric, 
- lithium-fabric, 
- malilib-fabric, 
- minihud-fabric, 
- modelfix, 
- modernfix-fabric, 
- modmenu, 
- moreculling, 
- MouseTweaks-fabric, 
- placeholder-api, 
- qdaa, 
- reeses_sodium_options, 
- Searchables-fabric, 
- smoothmenu, 
- sodium-extra, 
- sodium-fabric, 
- stackrefill, 
- status-effect-bars
